name: fragment-template
description: Reusable pipeline fragment scaffold. Replace the placeholder contract fields and step bodies with a real reusable flow.
_migration_note: v2: Typed Flow format (role/produces/consumes). Keep this file as the canonical fragment starter.

context.purpose: Describe what this fragment does in one sentence.
context.required_inputs: List the variables or bindings the fragment expects.
context.produced_channels: List the channels or artifacts the fragment emits.
context.failure_modes: List the common failure states the caller should handle.

params.message: Required inputs: {{required_inputs}} | Produced channels: {{produced_channels}} | Failure modes: {{failure_modes}}
Before reusing this fragment, preview it with: {{verification_command}}
